originalTitle: ICE CREAM MAN | Official Red Band Trailer | STUDIOCANAL
content: This summer, the children are having a meltdown. 🍦 Witness the new RED BAND trailer for Eli Roth's ICE CREAM MAN. In cinemas August 7th. An idyllic summer town descends into madness when an ice cream man serves kids sweet delights with horrifying results. #icecreamman #eliroth #studiocanal Visit our website for more: https://www.studiocanal.co.uk

chineseContent: 今年夏天，孩子们正经历着崩溃。 🍦 见证 Eli Roth 的 ICE CREAM MAN 的全新 RED BAND 预告片。 8月7日上映。当一名冰淇淋店老板为孩子们提供甜蜜的食物却带来了可怕的结果时，一个田园诗般的夏日小镇陷入了疯狂。 #icecreamman #eliroth #studiocanal 请访问我们的网站了解更多信息：https://www.studiocanal.co.uk
